tvShow.name: The Bear
tvShow.overview: Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a rough-around-the-edges crew that ultimately reveal themselves as his chosen family.

episodes.name: System
episodes.overview: Carmy attempts to retrain the employees of The Original Beef of Chicagoland, but is faced with resistance; in need of back-up, he brings on a talented young chef to help.

episodes.name: Hands
episodes.overview: A surprise health inspection reveals the cracks in the restaurant's foundation. Carmy goes head-to-head with Richie.

episodes.name: Brigade
episodes.overview: Carmy attends Al-Anon. Sydney struggles to gain the respect of the staff.

episodes.name: Dogs
episodes.overview: Carmy and Richie cater a kid's birthday party. Tina and Sydney work together while Marcus makes donuts.

episodes.name: Sheridan
episodes.overview: Things go wrong in the kitchen. Sydney finds solutions.

episodes.name: Ceres
episodes.overview: Richie notices the neighborhood is changing. Sugar and Carmy clean up the office.

episodes.name: Review
episodes.overview: A bad day in the kitchen causes tensions to rise.

episodes.name: Braciole
episodes.overview: Things get out of control. Carmy is faced with a decision.

episodes.name: Beef
episodes.overview: Faced with the reality of opening a new restaurant, the crew must make a plan.

episodes.name: Pasta
episodes.overview: The crew splits up to work towards their new vision.

episodes.name: Sundae
episodes.overview: Sydney searches Chicago for culinary inspiration.

episodes.name: Bolognese
episodes.overview: The crew awaits a do-or-die fire suppression test.

episodes.name: Omelette
episodes.overview: Final preparations are made for The Bear's first service.

episodes.name: The Bear
episodes.overview: Friends & Family night at The Bear.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: In season two, Carmen 'Carmy' Berzatto, Sydney Adamu and Richard 'Richie' Jerimovich work to transform their grimy sandwich joint into a next-level spot. As they strip the restaurant down to its bones, the crew undertakes transformational journeys of their own, each forced to confront the past and reckon with who they want to be in the future.

episodes.name: Tomorrow
episodes.overview: The next day and the days that led to it.

episodes.name: Doors
episodes.overview: The staff slogs through a month of service.

episodes.name: Violet
episodes.overview: Sydney gets a new apartment. Marcus finds inspiration.

episodes.name: Children
episodes.overview: The Computer gives The Bear its odds.

episodes.name: Napkins
episodes.overview: Tina looks for a new opportunity.

episodes.name: Legacy
episodes.overview: The restaurant is out of C-Folds. Sydney is presented with an opportunity.

episodes.name: Ice Chips
episodes.overview: Sugar finds support in an unexpected place.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: In season three, Carmen 'Carmy' Berzatto, Sydney Adamu, and Richard 'Richie' Jerimovich do what it takes to elevate The Bear, their beef stand turned fine dining establishment, to the highest level, all while doing their best just to stay in business. Our chefs have learned that every second counts, but this season we'll find out if they have what it takes to make it to tomorrow.

seasons.name: Season 4
seasons.overview: Season four finds Carmen "Carmy" Berzatto, Sydney Adamu and Richard "Richie" Jerimovich pushing forward, determined not only to survive, but also to take The Bear to the next level. With new challenges around every corner, the team must adapt, adjust and overcome. This season, the pursuit of excellence isn't just about getting better - it's about deciding what's worth holding on to.

episodes.name: Lamb
episodes.overview: The staff prepares for the day.

seasons.name: Season 5
seasons.overview: The fifth and final season picks up the morning after Sydney, Richie and Natalie 'Sugar' discover that Carmy has quit the food industry, leaving the restaurant to them. With no money, the threat of a sale and a torrential storm in their way, the new partners must band together with the rest of the team to achieve one last service, hoping they'll finally earn a Michelin star. Ultimately, they learn that what makes a restaurant "perfect" might not be the food, but the people.

alternativeTitles.title: The Bear : Sur place ou à emporter

reviews.author: redrumthebum
reviews.content: first episode in and i'm already hooked! most of my experience of watching this is just me forgetting to breathe for long periods of time. definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Horseface
reviews.content:
This is like the chef version of that dumb-ass movie where a guy keeps shouting at a drummer to make him play better.

It's what Guy Ritchie would turn in if asked to do a show on a mom-and-pop sandwich shop, but make it interesting. Not knowing how to make anything interesting other than drizzling testosterone over a bunch of murderous wise guys talking smack and getting in each other's faces, he at first didn't know what to do.

Then, he snorted 50 g of cocaine and realized, "Hey! I CAN do the same thing I always do!"

The studio execs loved it, because they were retards dealing with a retard, and they knew their audience were retards, too, and here we are.

Retarded shit for retarded pigs. It's 2024.
